title: Illinois Association of Disability Examiners (IADE) — Constitution (with appended Minnesota By-Laws)
description: Governing document for the Illinois Association of Disability Examiners (IADE), a Great Lakes Region chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE). The Illinois Constitution (Articles I-XIII) covers name, relationship to NADE, definitions, purposes, membership and powers, meetings, the Executive Board (officers plus four at-large board members, committee chairs, optional New Member Representative), officers (President/President-Elect/Secretary-Treasurer/Immediate Past President; fiscal year Nov 1-Oct 31), elections, eight standing committees (including named chapter awards), parliamentary authority, amendments, and Delegate Assembly representation; rewritten/corrected 09/26/03 at Springfield, IL. After a separator the file then contains the full By-Laws of the MINNESOTA Association of Disability Examiners (a separate Great Lakes chapter), apparently concatenated in the source file.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Illinois Chapter
source.title: Constitution of the Illinois Association of Disability Examiners (IADE) [with appended Minnesota By-Laws]

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This .md is the markitdown-normalized conversion of the sibling source file 'Illinois-Cons-Bylaws.doc' in the same directory; expect conversion artifacts (extensive run-on indentation and unicode-hyphen sequences carried from the Word original; escaped signature-line underscores). CONTENT/CONTAMINATION FINDING: the file is two documents concatenated — the Illinois (IADE) Constitution ('Rewritten and corrected, 09/26/03, Springfield, IL') followed, after a separator rule, by the complete By-Laws of the MINNESOTA Association of Disability Examiners (M.A.D.E.). The Minnesota by-laws appear to have been appended in the source .doc and should arguably live in a Minnesota sidecar; they are described here only because they physically reside in this file. temporal_coverage is set to 2003 from the Illinois correction date (the only date present). The source URL is the NADE organization site, not a deep link.
